ItemData.Name: Sa Di Gioi Co
ItemData.Descript: Dai cua cac tieu Sa Di thuong deo.

ItemData.Name: Tang Gioi Co
ItemData.Descript: Dai cua cac tieu Sa Di thuong deo.

ItemData.Name: Phat an Gioi Co
ItemData.Descript: Dai tren do co an cua Phat mon.

ItemData.Name: Tang Gia Gioi Co
ItemData.Descript: Dai cua cac tieu Sa Di thuong deo.

ItemData.Name: Khon Loc mao
ItemData.Descript: Mu doi bang bong thuong hang.

ItemData.Name: Lam Lien Mao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mao lam tu nhung loai to dieu thuong hang.

ItemData.Name: Phu Dung Mao
ItemData.Descript: "Cac Tang Lu trung dang thuong deo, lam bang thu lua thuong dang. "

ItemData.Name: Tham Luan Mao
ItemData.Descript: "Cac Tang Lu trung dang thuong deo, lam bang thu lua thuong dang. "

ItemData.Name: Niem Ninh Mao
ItemData.Descript: Cac Tang Lu thuong dang thuong deo.

ItemData.Name: Ty Lo mao
ItemData.Descript: "Cac Tang Lu thuong dang thuong deo, tren co an Phat, Duong Tang thuong deo no "

ItemData.Name: Moc Tram
ItemData.Descript: Loai Tram Cac Dao si thuong dung.

ItemData.Name: Hoang Duong Moc Tram
ItemData.Descript: Loai tram duoc tinh che tu cay Hoang Duong.

ItemData.Name: Can Khon ket
ItemData.Descript: Loai dai Cac Dao si thuong deo.

ItemData.Name: Thai cuc Quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu Cac Dao si thuong deo.

ItemData.Name: Bat Quai Can
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khan Dao si thuong quan, lam bang lua thuong dang. "

ItemData.Name: Can Kham Can
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khan Dao si thuong quan, lam bang lua thuong dang.. "

ItemData.Name: Ngu Nhac Quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu Dao si thuong quan..

ItemData.Name: Thuong Thanh Quan
ItemData.Descript: Chi co nhung dao si nao da tu luyen den mot trinh do nhat dinh thi moi co the doi.

ItemData.Name: Tinh Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu co khac ten cua vi dao si, thuong thay o vung Giang Nam. "

ItemData.Name: Ngu lao quan
ItemData.Descript: La mot trong nhung loai mu thuong dang.

ItemData.Name: Truc Lap
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu thuong thay o vung Giang Nam.

ItemData.Name: Ngu Lap
ItemData.Descript: loai mu ngu gia thuong doi.

ItemData.Name: Tham Lo Thao Mao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu duoc tinh che tu nhung loai co quy hiem.

ItemData.Name: Chu Tao thao Mao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu duoc tinh che tu nhung loai co quy hiem. o.

ItemData.Name: Huyen Sa Dien Trao
ItemData.Descript: Loai ao sat thu thuong mac.

ItemData.Name: Thanh Sat dien trao
ItemData.Descript: Loai ao sat thu cao cap thuong mac.

ItemData.Name: Nhan Bi Dien Trao
ItemData.Descript: "Nghe noi sau khi giet nguoi thi lot da lam ao, oan khi cuon cuon. "

ItemData.Name: Ngu Doc phat ket
ItemData.Descript: Loai Doc duoc che tu nam loai ran doc.

ItemData.Name: Bach Doc phat ket
ItemData.Descript: Loai Doc duoc che tu 100 loai hoa co doc.

ItemData.Name: Tu La Phat ket
ItemData.Descript: "La mot di vat tren the gian, sat khi toa ra ngun ngut. "

ItemData.Name: Nho Can
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khan cac tu tai thuong quan, di dau cung thay. "

ItemData.Name: Tien Kien Quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai khan cac tu tai thuong doi.

ItemData.Name: Viet My Quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai khan mu cac van nhan thuong doi.

ItemData.Name: Phi Yen Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu rat dep, danh si ua dung. "

ItemData.Name: Dieu Thien Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu rat dep, danh si ua dung. "

ItemData.Name: Lang Ta Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Tinh che bang thep, doi vao tinh luc tang len rat nhanh. "

ItemData.Name: Anh Lac Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu rat dep, duoc kham bang co Anh Lac, cac van nhan Nho si thuong thich doi"

ItemData.Name: Tu Kim phat Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Dung nhung loai bach kim va bao thach quy hiem che thanh, cu ky cao quy. "

ItemData.Name: That Bao phat Quan
ItemData.Descript: "La loai mu cao quy, thuong do Hoang Thuong ban tang. "

ItemData.Name: Thong Thien Phat Quan
ItemData.Descript: "La loai mu cao quy, chi co Hoang Thuong moi duoc doi"

ItemData.Name: Dong Khoi
ItemData.Descript: Loai khoi lam bang tinh dong thuong dang.

ItemData.Name: Ban Dien Khoi
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khoi che mot nua mat phia truoc, co the chong ten. "

ItemData.Name: Song Dien Khoi
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khoi che kin dau, chi chua hai lo mat de nhin. "

ItemData.Name: Thiet Khoi
ItemData.Descript: Loai khoi lam bang tinh thep thuong dang.

ItemData.Name: Tinh Dong Dau Khoi
ItemData.Descript: Loai khoi lam bang tinh dong thuong dang.

ItemData.Name: Cang khoi
ItemData.Descript: Loai khoi bang thep nguyen chat.

ItemData.Name: Ngan Khoi
ItemData.Descript: Loai khoi bang bac nguyen chat.

ItemData.Name: Tinh Cang Khoi
ItemData.Descript: Loai khoi bang thep nguyen chat..

ItemData.Name: Kim Khoi
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khoi giap bang vang, kha nang phong ngu rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Yem Nhat khoi
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khoi giap bang vang, kha nang phong ngu rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Pha Bo Can
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khan nhung nguoi an may thuong quan tren dau, rat rach nat. "

ItemData.Name: Bat Phuong Can
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khan nhung nguoi an may thuong quan tren dau, hinh nhu cung khong co cong dung gi. "

ItemData.Name: Tieu Dieu Can
ItemData.Descript: Loai khan nhung nguoi an may thuong quan tren dau.

ItemData.Name: Lo Thien Can
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khan nhung nguoi an may thuong quan tren dau, rat thong dung"

ItemData.Name: Bach Thuc Hoan
ItemData.Descript: "Vong deo tren co, tuong trung cho dang cap Cai Bang. "

ItemData.Name: Luu Ly Hoan
ItemData.Descript: Loai vong deo co kham nhieu ngoc Luu Ly.

ItemData.Name: Song Tang Luu Ly Hoan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai vong deo co kham nhieu ngoc Luu Ly, co hai lop. "

ItemData.Name: Tin nhoa Hoan
ItemData.Descript: Loai vong deo the hien tinh than cua Cai Bang.

ItemData.Name: Tinh nhoa Hoan
ItemData.Descript: Loai vong deo the hien tinh than cua Cai Bang.

ItemData.Name: Trich Tinh hoan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai vong deo co kham nhieu ngoc Luu Ly, bao vat cua Cai Bang. "

ItemData.Name: Bo Can
ItemData.Descript: Loai khan thuong doi cua nhung nguoi binh dan.

ItemData.Name: Binh Dinh Can
ItemData.Descript: Loai khan thuong doi cua nhung nguoi binh dan nhung dang cap cao hon mot chut so voi Bo Can.

ItemData.Name: Bo Nhung Can
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khan cua nhung nguoi binh dan, tuong doi am. "

ItemData.Name: Nhan Vu Can
ItemData.Descript: "Nghe noi dung long chim nhan det thanh, thuc te chi la lam tu nhung long chim binh thuong ma thoi. "

ItemData.Name: Y To Phat Dai
ItemData.Descript: "Dung loai to tinh pham det thanh, kieu dang rat dep. "

ItemData.Name: Kim To Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Duoc lam bang to, tinh bao ve rat tot."

ItemData.Name: Chu Khoi Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu det bang to thuong pham, kieu dang rat dep. "

ItemData.Name: Doanh Giac Mao
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu det bang to thuong pham co diem them nhieu hat ngoc nho, gia rat dat. "

ItemData.Name: Tam To Mao
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu det bang to thuong pham, phong cach quy phai. "

ItemData.Name: O Tam Mao
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu det bang to O Tam thuong pham, phong cach quy phai. "

ItemData.Name: Thich Ni Mao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu cac ni co thuong doi.

ItemData.Name: Thich Ni Mao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu cac ni co thuong doi.

ItemData.Name: Thich Ni Mao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu cac ni co thuong doi.

ItemData.Name: Thich Ni Mao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu cac ni co thuong doi.

ItemData.Name: Thanh Mao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu mau xanh cua Phat gia.

ItemData.Name: Thanh Anh Mao
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu mau xanh cua Phat gia, co tua ru xuong. "

ItemData.Name: Thien Thanh Mao
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu mau xanh cua Phat gia, thanh thoat cao quy. "

ItemData.Name: Xich anh phat Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu cao cap cua Phat gia, dung trong nhung luc nghiem trang. "

ItemData.Name: Vo Tuong Phap Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu cao cap cua Phat gia, dung trong nhung luc nghiem trang. "

ItemData.Name: Quan Am Phat Quan
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu cao cap cua Phat gia.

ItemData.Name: Ngan Thoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai tram cai toc bang bac.

ItemData.Name: Ngan Liem Thoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai tram cai toc bang bac.

ItemData.Name: Ngan Liem Thoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai tram cai toc bang bac.

ItemData.Name: Ngan Hoan Thoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai tram cai toc bang bac.

ItemData.Name: Kim Thoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai tram cai toc bang bac.

ItemData.Name: Kim Hoan Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai tram cai toc bang bac, dang hoi tron. "

ItemData.Name: Kim Bo Dao
ItemData.Descript: Loai tram cai toc bang vang.

ItemData.Name: Phi Thuy Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai tram cai toc bang lua, co diem vang. "

ItemData.Name: Thai cuc Quan
ItemData.Descript: "La Mot loai mu cua cac dao si thuong doi, co the tru yeu diet quai. "

ItemData.Name: Am Duong Vo Cuc quan
ItemData.Descript: Bao vat cua cac dao gia.

ItemData.Name: BiTru
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu bao ho duoc tinh che tu nhung loai da thu, co kha nang tan cong va phong ngu rat tot. "

ItemData.Name: Dong Tru
ItemData.Descript: "Loai giap tru bang dong, cac si binh thuong mac. "

ItemData.Name: Tinh Dong Tru
ItemData.Descript: Loai khoi duoc tinh che bang dong.

ItemData.Name: Xich Don Bi Mao
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu bao ho duoc lam tu da su tu bien, tinh phong ngu tat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Thu Cot Tram
ItemData.Descript: Loai Tram lam bang xuong thu.

ItemData.Name: Tu Cot Tram
ItemData.Descript: Loai Tram lam bang xuong thu.

ItemData.Name: Huyen Cot Tram
ItemData.Descript: "Loai Tram lam bang xuong thu, rat quy hiem. "

ItemData.Name: Ho BiDien Trao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu phong ho thuong dang bang da Ho.

ItemData.Name: Dieu Bi Dien Trao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu phong ho thuong dang bang da chon.

ItemData.Name: Huyen Te Dien Trao
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu phong ho thuong dang bang da te giac, cuc ky quy hiem. "

ItemData.Name: Tho Thiet Dau Hoan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu bao ho tinh che tu thep, kha nang phong ngu rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Te Thiet Dau Hoan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu bao ho tinh che tu thep, kha nang phong ngu rat cao. "

ItemData.Name: Hoang Dong Dau Hoan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu bao ho tinh che tu dong, kha nang phong ngu rat cao"

ItemData.Name: Luc Ngoc Dau Hoan
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu bao ho tinh che tu thep co kham ngoc.

ItemData.Name: Ke Vi Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai thoa duoc lam tu duoi chim, rat nu tinh. "

ItemData.Name: Anh vu Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai tram thoa lam tu long chim anh Vu, rat dep. "

ItemData.Name: Ban Xa Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai tram thoa duoc mai tu bao thach, tron lan voi da ran, cuc ky cao quy. "

ItemData.Name: Chu Sa Dau Hoan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu bao ho tinh che tu thep, co kham rat nhieu loai da quy "

ItemData.Name: Minh Chau Dau Hoan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu bao ho tinh che tu vang, co kham rat nhieu hat Da Minh Chau. "

ItemData.Name: Long Huyet Dau hoan
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu bao ho tinhche tu vang cuc ky quy hiem.

ItemData.Name: Vien Mao
ItemData.Descript: Mot loai mu thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Duong Mao
ItemData.Descript: Mot loai mu thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Can Quan Mao
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu thong thuong, ai cung co the doi. "

ItemData.Name: Ty Giac Mao
ItemData.Descript: Mot loai mu tuong doi cao cap.

ItemData.Name: Thanh Phung Quan
ItemData.Descript: Mot loai khan ma cac nu tuong rat thich quan.

ItemData.Name: Kim Phung Quan
ItemData.Descript: Mot loai khan duoc det tu Kim To.

ItemData.Name: Song Phung Trieu Thien Quan
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu bao ho tinh che tu vang, trum kin ca dau. "

ItemData.Name: Phi Thuy Khoi
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu bao ho tinh che tu vang, trum kin ca dau. "

ItemData.Name: Giai Trai Khoi
ItemData.Descript: "Loai mu da duoc yem bua chu, tuong trung cho quyen luc. "

ItemData.Name: Long Lan Khoi
ItemData.Descript: "Khoi phat ra hao quang nhu rong lan uon luon, Vua nhin da biet ngay la mot pham vat cuc ky quy hiem. "

ItemData.Name: Bo Mao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Vien Dinh Mao
ItemData.Descript: Loai mu bang vai co dinh tron.

ItemData.Name: Pham Van Mao
ItemData.Descript: "Loai ao truyen thong cua Phat gia, tren dau co an Phat. "

ItemData.Name: Thanh Van Khoi
ItemData.Descript: Loai khoi co rat nhieu hoa van.

ItemData.Name: Hong Anh Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai thoa co cac tua nho bang long chim ru xuong, cao quy my le. "

ItemData.Name: Xich Huyet Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Mot loai tram thoa quy hiem, co mau do nhu huyet. "

ItemData.Name: Luu Ly Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Thoa lam tu ngoc Luu Ly, cuc ky quy hiem. "

ItemData.Name: Loc nhi Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Thoa lam tu gac huou, vua dep vua huu dung. "

ItemData.Name: Lam Tinh Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Thoa co kham thuy tinh, cuc ky quy hiem. "

ItemData.Name: Thanh Tinh Thoa
ItemData.Descript: "Thoa co kham thuy tinh xanh, anh sang huyen ao, cuc ky quy hiem"

ItemData.Name: Hoang Bo Phat Dai
ItemData.Descript: Mot loai dai that thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Hoang Bo Phat Dai
ItemData.Descript: Mot loai dai that thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Hoang Bo Phat Dai
ItemData.Descript: Mot loai dai that thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Hoang Bo Phat Dai
ItemData.Descript: Mot loai dai that thong thuong.

ItemData.Name: Hoang Dong Phat Xoa
ItemData.Descript: "Loai tram cai bang dong, gia tri tam thuong. "

ItemData.Name: Hong Ma Nao Phat Xoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai tram cai bang Ma Nao pha lan nhieu loai bao thach.

ItemData.Name: Thanh Luu Ly Phat Xoa
ItemData.Descript: Loai tram cai bang Luu Ly pha lan nhieu loai bao thach.

ItemData.Name: Huy Thuy Khoi
ItemData.Descript: Loai khoi giap chi danh rieng cho cac tuong linh chi huy.

ItemData.Name: Phung Nhan Khoi
ItemData.Descript: Loai khoi giap co hinh dang nhu dau chim phung.

ItemData.Name: Kim Phung Trien Si
ItemData.Descript: "Loai khoi giap co hinh dang nhu dau chim phung, chi danh cho tuong linh. "
